metadata.description: Search and discover profile-filtered Elegy capabilities on demand through the host-facing agent surface. Use this instead of loading all skill definitions into context. Start with agent discover to find relevant capabilities, then expand with detail when the host chooses to disclose implementation metadata.
metadata.summary: On-demand host-facing discovery and routing through `elegy agent discover` without loading all definitions into context.
metadata.author: Elegy Contributors

capabilities.name: Discover Capabilities
capabilities.description: Find relevant profile-filtered skills and capabilities by keyword or task description. Returns compact index-level results by default. Detail and profile flags are controlled by the host invocation context.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search query matched against skill names, keywords, triggers, and capability descriptions.

output.description: Profile-filtered discovery envelope with match scores, matched capabilities, match reasons, and expandCommandArgs for machine-safe detail expansion. Hosts preserve their active profile when expanding.

capabilities.name: Expand Discovery Detail
capabilities.description: Get detail-level profile-filtered discovery for a specific skill or alias. The host should preserve its active profile when invoking this capability.

parameters.name: skillId
parameters.description: The skill identifier or alias to expand (e.g. 'diagram', 'skill-router').

output.description: Detail-level profile-filtered discovery envelope including allowed capabilities with implementation blocks.

capabilities.name: List Discoverable Capabilities
capabilities.description: List profile-filtered discoverable skills with compact index-level metadata. Detail and profile flags are controlled by the host invocation context.

output.description: Profile-filtered discovery envelope with skill id, name, description, category, capability count, lifecycle state, and expansion hints.

constraints.description: Discovery responses use progressive disclosure: index output is compact, and host-controlled --detail adds allowed capabilities and implementation metadata. This minimizes context token usage.

triggers.description: When an agent needs to discover which Elegy capabilities are available.
When searching for specific Elegy tools or operations.
When an agent wants to understand all available Elegy capabilities.
When setting up skill routing or progressive context loading.
